_changelog_2026_06_18: Added 192.168.178.94 to safe_ips as a Pi-hole DNS server.
Added safe_host_patterns for Pi-hole hostname exclusion.
Added alert_json_path and alert_json_max_bytes for capped JSON alert logs.

_config_notes.window_seconds: 300s (5 min) — was 600. Faster DGA detection, matches startup_lookback
_config_notes.ml_warmup_samples: 5000 — was 10000. Per-device model now activates in ~2.8h not 5.5h
_config_notes.baseline_alpha: 0.05 kept — correct EWMA speed for rate/entropy/unique
_config_notes.decay_factor: 0.995 kept — correct domain count half-life of ~4.6 min
_config_notes.poll_interval: 2s kept — optimal, Pi-hole DB is event-driven not time-driven
_config_notes.alert_threshold: 6.0 kept — well-calibrated after FP sensitivity fixes
